name: nable
description: Local-first FinOps for Claude. Ask your AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, and SaaS bill in plain English.

plugins.name: nable
plugins.description: Local-first FinOps copilot. 160+ read-only tools for cost queries, anomaly detection, rightsizing, and PRs across AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, and SaaS. Includes a /nable:connect command. Credentials stay in your OS keychain.
